schema_stress_test.selection_method: deterministic random sample of 3 Markdown files from the 29-file PyMuPDF4LLM corpus
schema_stress_test.source_truth_note: Original PDFs remain source truth. Markdown table/chart/numeric content is not final data and needs separate QA.

records.source_quote: Effective debt management is essential for developing a viable and stable debt portfolio.
records.claim: The chapter frames effective debt management as necessary for a viable and stable debt portfolio.
records.effect: reduced risk to economic growth and stability

records.source_quote: Unsustainable level of debt coupled with absence of prudent debt management strategy may plague economic growth
records.claim: The chapter warns that unsustainable debt without prudent management can harm economic growth.
records.constraint_or_risk: unsustainable debt and weak debt management
records.effect: lower development expenditure and weaker growth

records.source_quote: composition of public debt further improved due to increased mobilization through medium to long term domestic debt instruments
records.claim: Public debt composition was said to improve because of greater mobilization through medium- to long-term domestic debt instruments.
records.cause: increased mobilization through medium- to long-term domestic debt instruments
records.effect: improved public debt composition

records.source_quote: the cost of domestic borrowing is expected to reduce in the coming years
records.claim: The chapter expected domestic borrowing costs to fall in coming years.
records.cause: lower rates on government debt instruments and rollover/new issuance
records.effect: reduced domestic borrowing costs

records.source_quote: Government updated its Medium Term Debt Management Strategy
records.claim: The government updated the Medium Term Debt Management Strategy.
records.constraint_or_risk: public debt sustainability and cost-risk objectives
records.effect: sustainable public debt growth while meeting cost and risk objectives

records.source_quote: Government's vision is to further reduce the statutory debt limit
records.claim: The government stated a vision to reduce the statutory debt limit over time.
records.policy_or_programme: Fiscal Responsibility and Debt Limitation Act amendment
records.constraint_or_risk: high statutory debt limit and fiscal deficit
records.effect: lower statutory debt and deficit limits

records.subsection: Box-2 - Medium Term Debt Management Strategy
records.source_quote: Minimizing the risks of the government public debt portfolio
records.claim: The updated debt strategy included minimizing risks in the public debt portfolio.
records.effect: lower debt portfolio risks

records.subsection: Extension of Average Time to Maturity
records.source_quote: Government intends to focus on extension of average time to maturity of its domestic debt.
records.claim: The government intended to lengthen the average maturity of domestic debt.
records.effect: improved maturity profile and protection against interest-rate increases

records.subsection: More External Flows Supplementing Short Term Domestic Debt
records.source_quote: the aim is to attract maximum external flows which would support the balance of payment position
records.claim: The debt strategy aimed to attract external flows to support the balance of payments and exchange-rate stability.
records.effect: support for balance of payments and exchange-rate stability

records.source_quote: the government is taking various steps to provide an efficient and liquid secondary debt market
records.claim: The government was taking steps to develop a more efficient and liquid secondary debt market.
records.effect: more efficient and liquid secondary debt market

records.source_quote: rapid increase in population growth creates pressure on resources, employment opportunities, income distribution, poverty and social protection projects
records.claim: The chapter states that rapid population growth pressures resources, jobs, income distribution, poverty, and social protection.
records.effect: pressure on resources, employment, income distribution, poverty, and social protection projects

records.source_quote: The demographic transition provides a window of opportunity for rising economic growth and prosperity.
records.claim: The chapter frames demographic transition as an opportunity for economic growth and prosperity.
records.effect: opportunity for rising economic growth and prosperity

records.source_quote: The government is well aware of this and trying to tackle this issue of high population growth rate
records.claim: The government was trying to address high population growth through population welfare and reproductive health programmes.
records.policy_or_programme: Family Welfare Centers; Reproductive Health Services Centers; Regional Training Institutes; Mobile Services Unit
records.effect: population growth management

records.source_quote: female education has a significant effect on fertility
records.claim: The chapter links female education with lower fertility.
records.effect: fewer children compared with women with less education

records.source_quote: government has launched a number of youth investment schemes
records.claim: The government launched youth investment schemes to develop youth skills and abilities.
records.policy_or_programme: Business Loans; Interest Free Loans; Youth Skill Development schemes; Youth Training Programme
records.constraint_or_risk: need to productively use youth human resources
records.effect: enhanced youth skills and abilities

records.source_quote: This improvement is due to the better health facilities.
records.claim: The chapter attributes improved crude birth/death indicators to better health facilities.
records.effect: improved crude birth and death rate indicators

records.source_quote: Reducing inequity and promoting female education are among the key strategies to reduce maternal and infant mortality.
records.claim: The chapter identifies reduced inequity and female education as key strategies for reducing maternal and infant mortality.
records.effect: lower maternal and infant mortality

records.source_quote: There is a great challenge to honor the commitments made by the Government of Pakistan
records.claim: The chapter frames international population and SDG commitments as difficult to meet.
records.effect: need for sustained implementation effort

records.source_quote: First Population Summit... highlighted the challenges of population growth
records.claim: The government held the First Population Summit to elevate population welfare and population-growth challenges.
records.effect: population welfare announced as a high priority and comprehensive policy consultation stressed

records.source_quote: Gender equality is not only a fundamental human right, but a necessary foundation
records.claim: The chapter frames gender equality as foundational for peaceful, prosperous, and sustainable development.
records.cause: equal access to education, health care, decent work, and representation
records.effect: sustainable economies and social benefit

records.source_quote: Urban-rural comparison shows that in urban areas the unemployment rate is higher
records.claim: The chapter states that unemployment is higher in urban areas than rural areas.
records.cause: rural-urban migration and insufficient industrial absorption
records.effect: higher urban unemployment

records.source_quote: provide complete data on all sectors of the economy
records.claim: The Statistical Supplement is positioned as a data companion covering all sectors of the economy.
records.effect: supports policy-makers, researchers, representatives, students, and users

records.source_quote: time series data on financial, economic and social sectors
records.claim: The supplement emphasizes time-series data across financial, economic, and social sectors.
records.effect: sector-wise convenience for policy makers, researchers, and users

records.source_quote: various Ministries/Divisions/Agencies and Departments
records.claim: The supplement's data compilation depended on supplied data from multiple government bodies.
records.effect: release of the Statistical Supplement

records.source_quote: - : Not available     mp : Market prices     fc : Factor cost P: Provisional,    R: Revised,       F: Final
records.claim: The supplement uses status markers for not available, provisional, revised, and final data.
records.constraint_or_risk: mixed data statuses across table entries
records.effect: table values require status-aware interpretation

records.source_quote: From 2016-17, CPI is estimated on 2015-16=100 as base year
records.claim: The CPI series changes base year from 2016-17 onward.
records.effect: CPI interpretation requires base-year awareness

records.source_quote: Total may differ due to rounding off
records.claim: Some totals in the supplement may differ because of rounding.
records.effect: reported totals may not sum exactly

records.source_quote: Population Data revised from 2016 on the basis of projections provided by NIPS
records.claim: Population data from 2016 onward were revised using NIPS projections.
records.constraint_or_risk: revision and projection basis affects comparability
records.cause: NIPS projected data based on Census 1998
records.effect: population series revised from 2016

records.source_quote: GROWTH AND INVESTMENT
records.claim: The supplement organizes statistical material into cross-sector table families, not narrative chapters.
records.constraint_or_risk: records are often table references rather than commentary claims
records.effect: claim extraction should treat supplement records differently from prose chapter records

records.source_quote: TRADE AND PAYMENTS
records.claim: The supplement combines many indicator families on dense pages, making one-page extraction units too broad.
records.constraint_or_risk: many unrelated indicators share the same page
records.effect: schema needs table/indicator reference fields to avoid ambiguous source grounding

records.source_quote: Labour Force Survey 2018-19 Notes
records.claim: Some supplement values depend on survey-specific notes and should carry source-method metadata.
records.effect: values need method-aware review before numeric use

records.source_quote: We would welcome comments and suggestions for improvement
records.claim: The supplement invites feedback and suggestions for improvement.
records.effect: future improvement of the publication
